name: vercel-policy
description: Vercel deployment policy governing project creation, deployment, environment variables, and domain binding — Monorepo mode with glotalk team

policy.principle: Each domain gets ONE independent Vercel project under the glotalk team. rootDirectory points to the domain folder in the monorepo. Deployments are production-targeted.

team.description: All Vercel projects are created under the glotalk team

projectCreation.description: Project name = normalized domain (e.g. websitefactorytest-online). rootDirectory = domain folder in monorepo. If project exists → update.

deployment.description: Deployment triggers production build and polls until READY + PROMOTED

environmentVariables.description: All environment variables are encrypted and available in all scopes

domainBinding.description: Both apex and www domains are bound. 409 conflicts are resolved by retrieving existing binding.

projectCleanup.description: Old projects are not automatically deleted. Cleanup requires explicit verification.
